programmes.show_description: Drama series. The women return to Wentworth after the rebuild to find a new dynamic in play, which has immediate ramifications for Bea. Ferguson plans her next move.
Millie's unborn child is severely distressed, and she's rushed to the hospital. And Katie has gone missing. Full of jealousy, she packs her bags to follow her boyfriend to Zante.
Noel decides to search for another house, but the children realise there aren't enough rooms for them all. Plus, Ellie gets trolled online during her 18th birthday celebrations.
It's the final auction in Oxfordshire, as Paul takes on local antiques legend Tom Keane, a former boxer with a tough competitive streak. Who will take the crown as the winner? (Ep30)

programmes.show_description: Ben Fogle meets a husband and wife who gave up the city rat race to live as safari guides in an unexplored Tanzanian national park.
Imperial Japan, desperate to stop the rampant US forces before they reach mainland Japan, build a network of defensive lines, bunkers and fortifications across the island of Okinawa.
Jessica returns to Ireland and finds herself fighting to stop a mining conglomerate from destroying a beautiful valley.
Murder mystery series. The therapist of a top young tennis player with a tragic past is killed during a charity tournament.
Murder mystery starring Peter Falk and Stephen Caffrey. The police lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but the occasion is marred by murder. (1991)
Absorbing documentary series. An extraordinary journey through Sicily across landscape bearing the remains of ancient civilizations and seven UNESCO World Heritage Sites.

programmes.show_description: Ben Fogle joins a couple as they begin a new life in a two-room derelict farmhouse in rural Hungary that they bought from the internet.
...Hypocrites? Are Harry and Meghan victims of press persecution, or are the allegations fair? This provocative documentary explores contradictions at the heart of the couple's post-royal life.
Documentary charting the unique life of Princess Anne, a trailblazer who's done it all her own way. Historians, royal experts and those who worked for her offer insights.
Drama series set in a Melbourne women's prison. Vera, Bridget and Bea are forced to collaborate when Ferguson launches a campaign to be released in amongst the women.
The Radfords face devastating news from their closest friends, the Walker family. And Noel celebrates Father's Day with 22 cards and some carefully prepared chocolate 'hot dogs'.
Jake and Chloe's relationship reaches crisis point over Jake not pulling his weight as a dad and partner. When Chloe moves out, is this really the end for the young couple?

programmes.show_name: Columbo: Make Me a Perfect Murder

A scenic journey recapturing the golden age of luxury train travel. Starting in Preston, through Cumbria and the landscapes of the Lake District.
An abandoned Nazi station. Once cutting-edge in design and construction, now lying disused, contaminated and dangerous. But who built it? And why was it abandoned?
From Monte Cassino to San Pietro and ultimately the defense of Rome, this is the amazing story of one of the toughest defensive structures that the Nazis ever conceived.
